name: mesh_doorbell_warrantless_evidence_subscription
premise: Police Chief Blake Ashcroft must decide whether to renew a vendor subscription that auto-ingests neighbors' doorbell mesh clips into investigations without warrants when AI tags gunshot audio. Civil liberties counsel Ward North shows mis-tags from fireworks disproportionately pull footage from majority-minority blocks. Canceling the subscription slows shooting investigations that solved four homicides last month. Keeping it may normalize warrantless visual dragnets. Stakeholders are split, and the decision must be justified in writing under a tight deadline with incomplete information. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Criminal Justice. The dilemma is widely framed as a rights vs utility tradeoff under incomplete information and tightening deadlines that discourage indefinite delay.

agents.name: Blake Ashcroft
agents.identity: I am the police chief accountable for homicide clearance rates, Fourth Amendment guidance from city attorneys, and community trust metrics. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want gunshot leads without building a parallel surveillance network that neighborhoods never voted for. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

agents.name: Ward North
agents.identity: I am civil liberties counsel who mapped mesh clip pulls to demographics and drafted injunctive risk memos for the city. I know that whichever policy I choose will be scrutinized after the fact as if the risk had been obvious.
agents.goal: I want the subscription canceled until warrant rules and audit trails are codified, even if clearance rates dip next quarter. I need a choice that is defensible if the worst case happens, not just the most convenient today.

choices: I will cancel the auto-ingest subscription and require warrant packets for each clip pull, accepting slower homicide leads during festival weekends.
I will keep auto-ingest but restrict pulls to corridors with corroborating 911 calls and publish quarterly demographic audits, accepting residual warrantless friction.
forced_choice.call_to_action: City council votes tonight on funding the contract renewal. Blake Ashcroft must choose between canceling auto-ingest or keeping it with corridor restrictions and audits. What does Blake Ashcroft do?
